title: [RUST] Command executable from untrusted-looking value (2 occurrences)
description:
Use a fixed executable allowlist; pass user data only as argv after validation. Command injection via Command::new with attacker-controlled input.

Count: 2 | Language: RUST | Severity: critical
close_reason: Closed

title: [RUST] Security token generated with non-cryptographic randomness (4 occurrences)
description:
Use OsRng/getrandom/ring::rand/openssl::rand or a framework helper backed by OS cryptographic randomness for tokens, sessions, CSRF nonces, OTPs, salts, API keys, and secrets.

Count: 4 | Language: RUST | Severity: critical
close_reason: Fixed: replaced std::process::id() with Ulid::new() for temp dir name in bundle.rs:244

title: [RUST] Secret, signature, or token compared with ==/!= (1 occurrence)
description:
Use subtle::ConstantTimeEq, ring::constant_time::verify_slices_are_equal, crypto_memcmp, or a reviewed constant-time helper for bearer tokens, HMACs, CSRF values, reset secrets, API keys, and signatures.

Count: 1 | Language: RUST | Severity: critical
close_reason: False positive: bundle.rs:235 compares a filename against a literal string, not a secret value

title: [RUST] Request-controlled value reaches HTTP response header (3 occurrences)
description:
Reject or strip CR/LF, use HeaderValue::from_str, percent-encode filename fragments, or route through a header-safe helper before writing response headers. Risk: HTTP header injection.

Count: 3 | Language: RUST | Severity: critical
close_reason: Closed

title: Add clap_complete dependency to Cargo.toml
description: Add `clap_complete` crate to crates/agentcarousel/Cargo.toml. This is a prerequisite for the completions subcommand — it provides the Shell enum and generate() function used to emit completion scripts for bash, zsh, fish, elvish, and PowerShell. Pin to a version compatible with clap 4.

title: Register Completions variant in Command enum and dispatch in run()
description: Wire the new completions module into crates/agentcarousel/src/cli/mod.rs: add `mod completions;`, add `Completions(completions::CompletionsArgs)` to the Command enum with a doc comment, and add the match arm in run() that calls `completions::run_completions(args)`. The subcommand must be visible in `agc --help` output.

title: Implement src/cli/completions.rs module
description: Create crates/agentcarousel/src/cli/completions.rs with CompletionsArgs (a Shell positional arg from clap_complete::Shell) and run_completions(). The function should call clap_complete::generate() targeting the Cli struct, writing the script to stdout. Shells to support: bash, zsh, fish, elvish, powershell.

title: feat: completions subcommand for shell completion generation
description: Add an `agc completions <shell>` subcommand that generates shell completion scripts for bash, zsh, fish, and PowerShell using clap_complete. This enables users to install tab-completion for the agc CLI without manual scripting. The subcommand should print the completion script to stdout so users can pipe it into their shell config (e.g. `agc completions zsh > ~/.zsh/completions/_agc`).
